intended_use: HeartKey Rhythm is intended for use by qualified healthcare professionals for analysing ECG data from adults. HeartKey Rhythm analyses a single ECG lead recorded from compatible devices used for arrhy
intended_use_full: HeartKey Rhythm is intended for use by qualified healthcare professionals for analysing ECG data from adults. HeartKey Rhythm analyses a single ECG lead recorded from compatible devices used for arrhythmia diagnostics such as Holters, Extended Holters, ECG Patches, Event Recorders, or other similar devices when assessment of the rhythm is necessary.
target_condition: Cardiac arrhythmias including atrial fibrillation, ventricular ectopy, bradycardia, tachycardia, and cardiac pauses
ground_truth: Known reference standard from proprietary dataset and standard databases
other_metrics: Performance testing included evaluation of sensitivity, specificity, and positive predictive values; all evaluated against clinically relevant acceptance criteria. Testing demonstrated acceptable performance with no residual anomalies during verification software tests.
